recommendations.title: Engage Regulators to Resolve Pricing Dispute
recommendations.description: Initiate immediate dialogue with UP government regulators to clarify and renegotiate electricity pricing terms to prevent contract termination and revenue loss.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids estimated revenue loss of ₹200 Cr from UP contract suspension, preserving regional revenue streams.

recommendations.title: Enhance Transparency via Proactive ESG Disclosures
recommendations.description: Publish detailed disclosures on pricing mechanisms and regulatory engagements in upcoming BRSR FY26 filings to improve ESG ratings and investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improves ESG ratings, potentially reducing cost of capital by 20-40 bps, saving ₹50-100 Cr annually in financing costs.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's enhanced ESG disclosures led to P/E rerating

recommendations.title: Accelerate Renewable Portfolio Expansion
recommendations.description: Commit to increasing renewable energy share to 80% by 2030, matching Tata Power's strategy to improve valuation and access green financing.
recommendations.profitability_link: Unlocks green financing and valuation premium, estimated at ₹3000 Cr uplift in market cap over 5 years.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's 80% renewable commitment and ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance

recommendations.title: Implement Proactive Regulatory Risk Monitoring
recommendations.description: Establish a dedicated team to monitor regulatory developments and preemptively address compliance issues to avoid future contract risks.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reduces risk of contract losses and P/E compression by 5-10%, protecting ₹500-1000 Cr in market valuation.

immediate_high.title: Engage Regulators to Resolve Pricing Dispute
